title: lolium remotum var. complanatum
intro: Lolium remotum var. complanatum, also known as jointed grass or bearded grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lolium remotum var. complanatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and lower cholesterol levels. Lolium remotum var. complanatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
